Interrupt Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x30
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Enables interrupt generation on Port A pins. A pin must be configured as Input (DDR=0) and in Software mode for interrupts to fire. 0=GPIO mode, 1=Interrupt enabled.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] inten rw 0x0 INTEN

Field Descriptions

inten - INTEN

0=GPIO, 1=interrupt enabled
